---
name: Security Issue
about: Report a security vulnerability
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: "security"
assignees: ""

---

⚠️ **IMPORTANT**: Do not disclose security vulnerabilities publicly.

If you found a security vulnerability, **please email security@yourdomain.com** instead of opening a public issue.

In your email, include:
- Description of vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Impact assessment
- Suggested fix (if available)
- Your name/contact (optional)

Thank you for helping us keep the project secure!
